subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is meet unto the Desired One, Who with but a single word hath rent asunder the thick veils and summoned the peoples of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که بیک کلمه خرق حجبات غلیظه فرمود و اهل عالم را
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @equality of men and women, @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity
